ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical test (e.g., Z-test, Bootstrap test) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistical test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistical test was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistical test was last updated */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store parameters specific to the statistical test (e.g., alpha for Z-test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the test */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical test performed */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value of the test result */,
  "ci_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "ci_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "null_hypothesis" TEXT /* Null hypothesis result (e.g., Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was last updated */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration used */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_run_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES statistical_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_run_by FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.0) */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical test */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the test configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store specific parameters for the configuration (e.g., number of iterations for Bootstrap test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES statistical_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the test result version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test result version */,
  "result_file" TEXT /* File path to the test result version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.0) */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset or test result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset or test result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the dataset or test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is deleted */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES test_result_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_comments_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is deleted */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES dataset_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the tag (e.g., for visualization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_tags_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the tag (e.g., for visualization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
